checks.expected_outcome: violations are surfaced in the Diagnostics 'Invariant Violations' panel
checks.implementation: page.tsx invariantFindings derives from graph.warnings; panel renders violations with invariant id + affected system + source artifact

checks.expected_outcome: panel never shows a green/success label when violations exist
checks.implementation: panel renders findings with red-left-border styling; success message only renders when invariantFindings.length === 0

checks.expected_outcome: graph builder warnings include missing_artifact entries that map to invariant 'artifact-first'
checks.implementation: graph.warnings include missing_artifact prefixes; invariantFindings maps them to invariant='artifact-first'
deriveDebugStatus + failureTaxonomy.mapSignalsToTaxonomy treat missing trace as missing_eval taxonomy; node inspector shows trace_gaps explicitly

checks.expected_outcome: missing_control / missing_enforcement_signal map to policy_mismatch, never another taxonomy
checks.implementation: FAILURE_TAXONOMY_TABLE pins evidence signals; tests assert mapping
checks.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/failureTaxonomy.test.ts: maps policy / control signals to policy_mismatch taxonomy

fix_summary: Invariant violations surface in Diagnostics panel; mapping is taxonomy-driven; success label only when no violations are present.
